menu_text: So, you have made it this far. I am Kihun Solstin, the Master of Wind. I control the unfettered Element like none other. As you should have learned, Air is the most potent of Elements. It fuels Fire, Water is comprised of it, and Earth cannot restrain it. Knowing this, do you seek the Element of Wind?
option_text: I want to see the master.

menu_text: Greetings, $N.
option_text: What is this matter of betrayal?
ReactionValue: One of our agents, a hero by the name of Goxnok, has found evidence that the book entitled 'Charasis' has been taken from this temple and is to be delivered to an unknown foe in the Outlands. Go at once to the lower levels of the temple and greet Goxnok. Hurry, before he departs!

menu_text: Greetings, $N.
option_text: What is this matter of betrayal?

menu_text: Well met, noble soul!  I'm Gimlik Cogboggle. You are correct, the Gimlik Cogboggle, renowned adventurer, scholar, and yes... creator of spells.  Please don't goggle or touch.  Your opportunity has arrived, my friend.  I was sent here to complete a very important task and for that, I will need some slight assistance.  If you will be kind enough to follow me, I'll show you to your doom... err... get this show on the road.  Just let me know when you're ready.
Heading: npcHeading

Welcome to the Traveler's Home, owned and operated by the House of Freegaze... err, I mean Freegraze, established in the year 2855. We gladly open our doors to any weary traveler. What can I do for you?
option_text: I am looking for Tolon Nurbyte.
ReactionValue: So you are inquiring about Mister Tolon Nurbyte, eh? He is on the second floor, last door on the right. You two had best not be up to any mischief. The pair of you look a little shifty for the kingdom of Felwithe.

menu_text: Oooh.. Hello, [guard]. Please do not let the [Teir'Dal] at me again. I can take no more.
ReactionValue: Are you searching for the rogue named Fenn Kaedrick? He used to be locked in here with me. That Lady McCabe bailed him out just minutes before the Teir'Dal planned to operate on him. He said that if I ever did escape, to venture to the very roof of this keep and wait till he showed up to escort me away from here.

ReactionValue: Har, I know you were a good sort. Nella has it. She's out there somewhere in the lower areas. She likes to visit the temple, so maybe she's there. Just tell 'er Jark sent ya and she'll prolly have everythin' ready fer me.

menu_text: Hello. It is dangerous out in the woods. You should go to Rivervale. It's at the end of the path. You will find good times there. Travel safely, my friend!
option_text: I will do you a small favor.
ReactionValue: I have been tracked here by a bounty hunter named Slaythe. I have heard reports of his presence beyond the Great Wall. Please seek him out and bring me some body part of his as proof of his passing. Do this and the emerald shard is yours.

menu_text: Hello. It is dangerous out in the woods. You should go to Rivervale. It's at the end of the path. You will find good times there. Travel safely, my friend!
option_text: I will do you a small favor.

menu_text: Welcome to intelligence, young  $N! Did you think all ogres were inept? Ha!! I hope you show the glimmer. We shamans need more within our ranks. Our race needs to evolve!! So, are you one of the smart ogres or have I spoken too many syllables?
option_text: Tell me about the secret mission.
ReactionValue: I have heard of your advancements. You are a fine addition to Oggok. I require your skill in handling a delicate matter. I want you to run out to the Bouncer's keep near the entrance to Oggok. There, you shall find a froglok named Glib. He will pose no threat to you. He has come on business and I have promised him protection. Tell him the Greenblood shaman sent you. He shall fill you in. Go at once.

menu_text: Welcome to intelligence, young  $N! Did you think all ogres were inept? Ha!! I hope you show the glimmer. We shamans need more within our ranks. Our race needs to evolve!! So, are you one of the smart ogres or have I spoken too many syllables?
option_text: Tell me about the secret mission.

menu_text: Welcome to my island. I always welcome visitors, but I would prefer that your stay not last too long. My warriors are sometimes tempted by others. That is why they all wear purity belts. I should warn you, also, to be on the lookout for the [Pirates of Gunthak].
ReactionValue: What? Why are you so concerned for Sentry Xyrin? She returned to Freeport last night right before.. Oh!! Oh, dear!! Right before the storm hit. If she did not make it back to Freeport. I fear she has drowned or is shipwrecked upon one of the nearby islands!! You must find her!

Kill the elf and the crate is yours!
